description: 10:1 rule bar diagram: tolerance band (LO/HI limit lines, shaded ACCEPT zone, hatched REJECT zones) above two steel rule bars on the same horizontal scale — a coarse rule whose single division nearly spans the whole band, with an amber uncertainty haze straddling both limits and a dim '?' verdict chip; and a fine rule with ten divisions across the band, a drawn cyan measurement needle landing clearly inside ACCEPT, and a bright check verdict chip.
